meta.title: 5 game-changing new WEAPONS coming online for the US ARMY
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

We recently covered 6 new weapons making their way toward service with the U.S. Air Force and five more for the Navy, so this time, let’s dive into the most strategically important and technologically advanced new weapons in the works for the U.S. Army.
